CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/BRENDA CRUS- SMITH AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 270 TURK ST, RM.#1005, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDI- ATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 3-29-94, 5PM - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - PL. FORF. SECURITY DEPOSIT & LAST MONTHS RENT IF ANY. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, CHARLES ESTHER
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS CARTER,CHARLES AND CARTER, ESTER TO BE CARTER, CHARLES ESTHER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, CHARLES ESTHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 270 TURK ST, #1005, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-29-1994, ALL MONETARY DAMAGES WVD. DEF. WAIVES SEC. DEP. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES. DEF. TO VACATE BY 5PM 3-29-94. PREMISES MAY BE PRE-POSTED.
